name: Bank19
description_short: First Bank and Trust is a community bank with locations in Memphis and Amarillo, Texas, offering deposit accounts, loans, online banking, and investment services backed by FDIC insurance.
description_long:
First Bank and Trust originated as a community bank serving the Memphis, Texas area and has maintained its community-focused philosophy despite growth. The institution now operates multiple locations across Texas, including branches in Memphis and Amarillo, while preserving the personalized service model that defined its founding mission. The bank positions itself as combining 'big-bank benefits with the convenience and customer service of your small-town branch.'

The bank offers a comprehensive range of financial services including deposit accounts (checking, savings, CDs), personal and commercial lending products, online and mobile banking platforms, and investment services. Their deposit services are FDIC-insured, and they provide lending for personal needs such as debt consolidation, auto purchases, and larger financial goals. The mobile banking app enables check deposits, fund transfers, bill payments, and balance inquiries from anywhere. Investment services are available through consultation with bank officers at physical locations.

First Bank and Trust distinguishes itself through physical branch accessibility combined with digital banking convenience. The company emphasizes relationship-based banking with named lending officers available for consultation and maintains a philosophy centered on serving 'friends and neighbors' in their communities. This approach targets consumers who value personal interaction alongside modern banking technology.

The bank operates as a traditional full-service community financial institution. While the website provides general service descriptions, specific product details (interest rates, loan terms, minimum deposits) are not publicly listed online, requiring prospective customers to visit branches or call directly. The NMLS number (552133) and FDIC membership status are clearly displayed, indicating regulatory compliance. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mobile banking app with check deposit capability
Online banking platform for account management
pros: FDIC-insured deposits across all account types for consumer protection
Multiple physical branch locations in Memphis and Amarillo, Texas for in-person service
Mobile banking app enabling check mobile deposit, fund transfers, and bill pay
Personalized lending consultation available with named loan officers
Full suite of services (deposit, lending, investment, online banking) in one institution
Community-focused philosophy with emphasis on relationship-based banking
Online and mobile banking available 24/7 for account access and transactions
cons: Limited geographic presence restricted to Texas (Memphis and Amarillo area only)
No specific interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules disclosed on website
Minimum deposit requirements and loan qualification terms not publicly listed
Investment services require in-person consultation rather than online tools
Website lacks detailed product comparison tools or calculators for borrowers
best_for: Texas residents in Memphis or Amarillo areas seeking traditional community banking with personal service
Small business owners needing commercial lending and business checking accounts
Consumers who prefer face-to-face consultation with loan officers for personal or commercial lending
Savers prioritizing FDIC-insured deposit products with relationship-based banking service
diagnosis: First Bank and Trust is best for Texas residents in the Memphis or Amarillo area who value personalized banking relationships and want FDIC-protected accounts with both digital and in-person service options. The main caveat is that this is a geographically limited regional bank—customers outside Texas cannot access physical branches, and specific product terms and rates must be obtained by visiting a branch or calling directly rather than through online comparison.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
